channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Daily)

item.title: 🐍 zhujingqi/Twitter_Engagement_Tool (224 ⭐)

item.title: 🐍 zanetanasta/Seed-Generator (119 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zanetanasta

📝 Repository: zanetanasta/Seed-Generator

📄 Descrizione: Professional BIP-39 Seed & HD Wallet Toolkit with 12–24 word mnemonics, checksum validation, BIP-44/49/84 derivation, and multi-chain support (BTC, ETH, SOL, LTC, DOGE, ADA, DOT, AVAX, ATOM, XRP, TRX). Features offline CSPRNG, PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512, AES-256-GCM encryption, wallet recovery, CSV/JSON export, and custom derivation paths.

⭐ Stelle: 119

🍴 Forks: 26

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: brute-force-tool mnemonic-code-converter mnemonic-generator-solana mnemonic-phrase mnemonic-recovery mnemonic-seed mnemonics-generator phrase-generator seed-phase-checker seed-phrases-finder seed-phrases-generate seed-phrases-generator seed-recovery-2025 seed-recovery-tool seed-tool-generate seedphrase seedphrase-checker seedphrase-generator seedphrase-generatorseed-generator

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 🐍 Anahitam1991/Exodus-Fake-Balance (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Anahitam1991

📝 Repository: Anahitam1991/Exodus-Fake-Balance

📄 Descrizione: Exodus Fake Balance — Native balance overlay tool for Exodus wallet with real-time spoofing across BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and 200+ assets, persistent hooks, and screenshot-safe display rendering

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: crypto-wallet-simulator exodus exodus-app exodus-fake-balance exodus-fake-balance-tool exodus-fake-money exodus-sdk-js exodus-wallet exodus-wallet-sdk fake-balance fake-balance-exodus fake-transaction flash-crypto-2025 flash-eth-software flash-loan flasher-script flasher-tool okx-fake-balance phantom-fake-money trustwallet-clone
